title: Filter by Portfolio Boards as a type in Content Directory
excerpt: We need the option for Monday to outline every portfolio board in our account including where it lives and who owns it. In the content directory we could achieve this by simply adding “portfolio board” as a type to be fi…

posts.author: sbronkemaAcrisure (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need the option for Monday to outline every portfolio board in our account including where it lives and who owns it. In the content directory we could achieve this by simply adding “portfolio board” as a type to be filtered by.

This would help with business governance for how portfolio boards are being used and allow us to make sure we have eyes on who is using them so we can provide the necessary training and support.
